super boof 28g (1 oz) super boof is a hybrid strain created by crossing black cherry punch and tropicana cookies. it was originally bred by california’s blockhead and later popularized by grower mobile jay. with its zingy and fruity flavor profile cherry citrus and berry notes this strain offers a truly unique experience. flower type 1 flow gardens

effects_provenance.raw: Fee Runtz THCA Flower Preferred / 28g Strain Profile Fee Runtz THCA Flower is a flavorful hybrid that blends the candy-sweet terpene profile of Runtz with a rich, gassy edge for a perfect balance of dessert and diesel. The cultivar produces dense, frost-coated buds with an aromatic profile bursting with tropical fruit, sugared berries, and creamy vanilla layered over subtle notes of fuel and spice. Effects Fee Runtz delivers a balanced experience that pairs warm cerebral euphoria with comfortable body relaxation. The high feels well-rounded and pleasant — suitable for late-afternoon use, social settings, or evening flavor-led decompression — with the kind of decadent character that distinguishes premium Runtz crosses. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: sweet tropical fruit up front, with sugared berries through the middle and a creamy vanilla-fuel finish on the exhale. Smoke is smooth and unmistakably layered. The terpene profile reads candy-and-gas — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Fee Runtz harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Fee Runtz THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Fee Runtz THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. Berry hybrid Sweet Tropical Fruit THCA Flower Lost In Translation

effects_provenance.raw: Blue Dream THCa Flower 14g Blue Dream THCa Flower Looking to spark creativity and melt away stress? Blue Dream THCa Flower is your go-to hybrid. A legendary cross of Blueberry and Haze , this sativa-dominant strain offers a smooth balance of uplifting cerebral energy and gentle body relaxation . Grown indoors and trimmed by hand, Blue Dream delivers dense buds with a frosty layer of trichomes and hues of green and violet. Its sweet berry-forward aroma with hints of pine and herbal spice makes every hit feel like a fresh, flavorful experience. Whether you’re easing into the evening or looking to stay sharp during the day, Blue Dream THCa offers a versatile high that suits both new and experienced smokers. effects_provenance.raw: Dante's Inferno THCa Flower 1g - Type 1 THCa What is Dante's Inferno THCa Flower Strain? Dive into the depths of relaxation with Dante's Inferno THCa Flower , an indica-dominant hybrid born from the legendary collaboration between Clearwater Genetics and Tiki Madman. This strain merges the genetics of Oreoz and Devil Driver, resulting in a potent, soothing experience. Its aroma tantalizes with sweet and creamy notes, while its appearance is nothing short of spectacular—dense, frosty buds that gleam with a "blingy" allure. Infused with a significant amount of cookies genetics, Dante's Inferno is your go-to for profound relaxation. Dante's Inferno Terpenes The terpene profile of Dante's Inferno contributes to its unique allure: Limonene : Brings a citrusy zest, uplifting the mood with its stress-reducing properties Caryophyllene: Offers a spicy, peppery scent, potentially aiding in stress relief. Pinene : Infuses a fresh pine scent, known to enhance alertness and memory, balancing the calming effects. These terpenes not only define the strain's aroma but also amplify its relaxing effects. Dante's Inferno Strain Cannabinoids THCA: 26.55% Total Cannabinoids: 27.54% D9-THC: 0.218% Dante's Inferno THCA Strain Effects Dante's Inferno delivers a deeply relaxing experience, thanks to its indica dominance, ensuring a profound, body-focused high that's perfect for unwinding. Its sweet and creamy aroma not only enhances the sensory experience but also uplifts the mood, providing a soothing escape from daily stresses. The strain's aromatic complexity adds a layer of enjoyment to each session, making it an ideal choice for evening use when you're looking for a serene, tranquil retreat. Genotype: Oreoz x Devil Driver Phenotype: Dante's Inferno Experience the otherworldly pleasure of Dante's Inferno, where each hit is a journey into tranquility, wrapped in an aromatic embrace that's both sweet and inviting. effects_provenance.raw: Purple Kush THCA Flower Preferred / 28g Strain Profile Purple Kush THCA Flower is a classic indica cultivar descended from the cross of Hindu Kush and Purple Afghani . The cultivar produces dense, deeply purple buds with the kind of trichome coverage that signals serious flavor depth — old-school kush character paired with sweet purple-grape character. Effects Purple Kush delivers deeply relaxing, indica-leaning effects ideal for evening use. The cerebral side stays warm and pleasant; the body settles fully into long, comfortable ease — making this a strong cultivar for unwinding, post-dinner decompression, or settling in for sleep with classic kush character. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: sweet grape up front, with earthy hashish through the middle and a warm spicy finish on the exhale. Smoke is full and unmistakably classic. The terpene profile reads grape-and-kush — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. lineage_provenance.raw: thca flower – rock candy net weight 14 grams strain traits rock candy ( sour dubble x tahoe alien ) (new batch 7 8 26) indica hybrid – 26.1% thca sensational cerebral relaxing calming carnivorous flowers watermelon cheese melted jolly ranchers coa legal information while technically thca isn’t delta 9 thc it should be noted that it’s likely to show on a thc focused drug screening. this is due to the nature of thca as a cannabinoid. being a pre cursor to delta 9 thc the combustion causes thca to decarboxylate – which in turn triggers it to change to delta 9 thc. those who are expecting a drug screening should refrain from smoking thca flowers as a precautionary measure. legal opinion letter note product not available in all states see the complete list below our product section here . thca best selling products indoor thca flower new & popular newest products products small buds thca flash sale thca flower indica indoor thca net weight 565 14 grams 14 grams 566 28 grams 28 grams 564 7 grams 7 grams

effects_provenance.raw: Pineapple OG THCa Flower 1g - Type 1 THCa Shop for Pineapple OG THCa Flower Pineapple OG THCa Flower is a tropical sativa-dominant hybrid that brings the heat with flavor and cerebral intensity. Born from the cross of Pineapple Express and OG Kush, this strain delivers bright, energetic effects paired with a mouthwatering pineapple-citrus profile that lingers long after the session. Whether you're looking to spark creativity, ease stress, or simply enjoy the ride, Pineapple OG blends sweet flavor with buzzy mental uplift, all wrapped in high-potency THCa flower. Pineapple OG, also known as Pineapple Kush or Pineapple OGK is a high-THCa sativa-dominant flower with strong tropical notes and long-lasting effects. The blend of Pineapple Express and OG Kush gives it a sweet-meets-skunky vibe, balancing juicy citrus with classic kush depth. This flower doesn’t just taste like summer, it smokes like it too, delivering clean energy, heady euphoria, and a mellow body feel.
